Compliance.description: Licensed SA car hire company, CPA compliant, no major violations found in 2025/2026 searches.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.74/5 (strong positive ratings); Google 4.4/5; praised for professionalism and fleet quality.

Product Value.description: Competitive rates; loyalty rewards; business rates; wide fleet including EVs; good value vs major brands.

Innovation.description: App booking, 360-degree vehicle inspection, EVs in fleet, loyalty program, modern booking system.

Customer Support.description: Responsive per reviews; professional at pickup/return; national network support.

Accessibility & Security.description: App booking; national presence; standard CPA/privacy compliance.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From ~R300/day economy; competitive vs Avis/Hertz; business rates available

socialSentiment.summary: Highly positive ratings; limited social data but reviews consistent.
